page.home.cta.btn: I want to join a programme
page.home.cta.text: Leave a request — we'll find the programme that's right for you.
page.home.directions.01.text: Pranayama, meditation, yoga — structured programmes for deepening your practice at your own pace.
page.home.directions.02.text: One-to-one work: energy, teenagers, personal questions — with a personal mentor.
page.home.directions.03.text: Team, principles and philosophy of shakti.ashram — who we are and how we work.
page.home.formats.text1: Practice from anywhere. Live sessions, recordings and feedback from your mentor at your own pace.
page.home.formats.text2: Live meetings and deep one-to-one work. In-person intensives and consultations — by arrangement.
page.home.hero.text: Author-led courses and personal consultations. Mindfulness practices and steady growth at your pace.
page.home.quote.line1: «Yoga is not what you do on the mat.
page.home.quote.line2: It is who you become — beyond it.»
page.home.reviews.1.name: Anna K.
page.home.reviews.1.quote: «The intensive helped me feel whole again — finally a real exhale.»
page.home.reviews.2.name: Mikhail R.
page.home.reviews.2.quote: «The pranayama course changed my relationship with breathing — and with life itself. Simple techniques that work every single day.»
page.home.reviews.3.name: Svetlana V.
page.home.reviews.3.quote: «One session gave me a clear plan for the next few months — straightforward, no unnecessary mysticism.»
page.home.title: shakti.ashram | Courses and consultations
privacy.contact: For personal data questions, use the contact page on the site.
privacy.intro: This policy explains what data the public shakti.ashram site collects when you submit a request and how it is used.
privacy.s1.li1: The request form stores your name, contact (phone, messenger or email) and comment text.
privacy.s1.li2: We may store context: selected course or consultation and preferred format.
privacy.s1.li3: Server logs may record IP and request metadata for abuse protection.
privacy.s1.p1: We only collect data you submit through the form and minimal technical information needed to run the service.
privacy.s1.title: 1. What data we collect
privacy.s2.p1: Data is used to respond to your request, clarify format and organise follow-up. No marketing mailings without separate consent.
privacy.s2.p2: There is no automated decision-making; requests are handled by a person.
privacy.s2.title: 2. How we use information
privacy.s3.li1: Requests are stored in the project database (PostgreSQL).
privacy.s3.li2: Media from third-party CDNs may load when you open pages.
privacy.s3.li3: Backups and retention are defined by the production infrastructure owner.
privacy.s3.p1: Data is stored on servers per the hosting agreement. Access is limited to the project team.
privacy.s3.title: 3. Where and how data is stored
privacy.s4.p1: Only authorised people handling requests have access. We share data with third parties only when required by law or to fulfil an agreement with you.
privacy.s4.p2: We do not sell personal data.
privacy.s4.title: 4. Who has access
privacy.s5.li1: Requests are kept as long as needed to process the enquiry and any ongoing correspondence.
privacy.s5.li2: You may request deletion where there is no legal basis to keep data.
privacy.s5.li3: Technical logs are rotated per server policy.
privacy.s5.p1: Retention aligns with processing purposes and applicable law.
privacy.s5.title: 5. Retention and deletion
privacy.s6.p1: After handover to the client, the site owner is responsible for publishing the policy and handling data-subject requests.
privacy.s6.p2: The contractor provides deployment and backup guidance as part of the project.
privacy.s6.title: 6. Responsibility after handover
privacy.s7.li1: Access your data and obtain a copy.
privacy.s7.li3: Request erasure where there is no lawful basis to retain.
privacy.s7.li4: Restrict or object to processing where applicable.
privacy.s7.li5: Receive your data in a structured format for portability (where applicable).
privacy.s7.p1: Under GDPR and applicable law you have the right to:
privacy.s7.p2: Contact us via the site to exercise these rights. We respond within 30 days.
privacy.s7.title: 7. Your rights
privacy.s8.li1: Essential cookies: language preference and cookie consent.
privacy.s8.li2: Analytics cookies only with explicit consent.
privacy.s8.p1: The site uses cookies for proper operation and service quality.
privacy.s8.p2: You can change your choice by clearing site data in the browser.
privacy.s8.title: 8. Cookies
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
section.cta.text: Submit a request — we'll reply within the day with details on the next intake.
terms.contact: For organisational questions, use the contact page.
terms.intro: Terms for using the public shakti.ashram site: courses and consultations, requests and limitation of liability.
terms.s1.p1: The site publishes course and consultation descriptions. Submitting a request does not automatically form a contract.
terms.s1.p2: Specific programme terms are confirmed in correspondence or a separate offer.
terms.s1.title: 1. General
terms.s2.li1: Site materials are for information; copying without the rights holder's consent is prohibited.
terms.s2.li2: You must not use the site for spam or to disrupt its operation.
terms.s2.li3: Confirm schedules and format availability with the team.
terms.s2.p1: By using the site you accept these terms and the privacy policy.
terms.s2.title: 2. Using the site
terms.s3.p1: Content is informational and does not replace medical or legal advice unless stated otherwise.
terms.s3.p2: Make health decisions with professionals when needed.
terms.s3.title: 3. Content limitations
terms.s4.li1: The service is provided as available; interruptions may occur.
terms.s4.li2: We aim to respond within reasonable time but do not guarantee specific deadlines.
terms.s4.li3: We are not responsible for third-party services or networks.
terms.s4.p1: To the extent permitted by law, liability is limited to providing information through the site.
terms.s4.title: 4. Availability and liability
terms.s5.p1: The platform is provided on a reasonable-efforts basis: uptime, backups and basic security.
terms.s5.p2: Practices and materials do not replace individual medical advice unless stated in the service description.
terms.s5.title: 5. Limitation of liability
terms.s6.p1: Terms may be updated; the current version is published on the site.
terms.s6.title: 6. Changes
terms.title: Terms of Use
